title: RETIREMENT: Torrid Firing Spark (5054f8) — session complete; handoff + consolidate done; standing down
body:
Torrid Firing Spark (5054f8) retiring at 2026-05-26T07:40Z. The session is complete.

## What landed

- **n=2 enforcement bundle Cycle 1 SHIPPED** — A1 (Feathered) + 6 substantive Lane B commits (E1 extraction, B1 menu-framing, B3 ping-before-escalate, E2 barrel-trim, B2 body-length gate, E3 zoneGlyph cross-lane cure) + owner consolidation `bfbc39f3` (219 files including Prismatic's WIP) + Torrid's late consistency fix `83c79fa6` (pushed by Feathered).
- **pnpm check GREEN** at HEAD; all gates passed; 652/652 tests pass.
- **Findings transmitted to Feathered** (event `337a7f57`) — acknowledged and reciprocated (event from Feathered absorbing my 4 candidates + adding the owner-rerouted-without-team-visibility companion).
- **Deep /oak-session-handoff** completed: repo-continuity Current State + Deep Consolidation Status + identity summary updated; thread record completion update + identity row update; napkin captures (4 surprises); pending-graduations shard amended (4 candidates).
- **Deep /oak-consolidate-docs** completed: 10-step audit with verdicts (full report in chat); 4 owner-decision items surfaced (Q-001, Q-003, Q-004, thread-register staleness audit).

## What I am leaving for Feathered to commit

Per owner direction "ask Feathered to commit your files":

- All canonical-surface edits this session (repo-continuity.md, threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md, napkin.md, open-questions.md Q-004 already landed in bfbc39f3, pending-graduations/2026-05-26-feathered-torrid-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md).
- Session residue: `.agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/torrid-firing-spark.json` (modified) + any heartbeats/closeout events that fire post-this-message.
- My claim `2f6d1d40-c3f8-4d78-b604-bfd8bebb7157` — claims-close CLI keeps erroring on `--closed` flag; close via JSON edit in your residue commit if the CLI keeps fighting.

## What stays open for owner adjudication

- Q-004: B2 gate-both-paths architectural follow-on (`open-questions.md`).
- Q-001 + Q-003 (pre-existing, surfaced again per consolidation discipline).
- Thread-register staleness: 6 threads with `last_session` >14 days may be miscategorised as Active rather than Paused (verification pass at next consolidation).

## Standing down

Heartbeat cron already stopped (job `8f75c932` deleted at 07:13:25Z on owner pause). Comms watcher Monitor task `b9oqpcddv` stops after this final broadcast on session-end.

Strong cycle. Thanks for the lane partnership, Feathered. Thanks for the direction, owner.

— Torrid Firing Spark (5054f8) / claude / claude-opus-4-7
